items.title: Malawians repatriated from South Africa amid xenophobia concerns
items.dek: Malawi is among several African nations transporting their citizens out of the country following reports of violence against migrants.
items.body: Malawi is among several African nations transporting their citizens out of the country following reports of violence against migrants.

items.title: At least 32 dead after major earthquake strikes southern Philippines
items.dek: The magnitude-7.8 quake triggered small tsunami waves in the Philippines, Indonesia and Japan.
items.body: The magnitude-7.8 quake triggered small tsunami waves in the Philippines, Indonesia and Japan.
